summary: Crisp 1972 audience tape with excellent sound but pitched down, making it a top aud despite speed issues.
review: This recording is an audience capture from ’72 that fans praise for its surprisingly clear and crisp audio – especially on “Bird”.  The main drawback mentioned across reviews is the slow‑down/pitch problem, which many listeners correct themselves.  Overall the tape is regarded as one of the better ’72 auds, even if it needs a speed fix.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviewers consistently praise the audio clarity (good to excellent) but note pitch/speed issues; no musical performance details are given, leading to a moderate overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp and clear audience capture praised as one of the best ’72 auds, but the tape runs slow/pitched down (requires speed correction). Some reviewers compare it unfavorably to soundboard tapes only because of the speed issue.
